meaning: n.洗发精,洗发香波,洗发vt.洗头,洗发
examples: This shampoo smells fruity and leaves the hair beautifully silky.
The shampoo lathers and foams so much it's very hard to rinse it all out.
Always using the same shampoo means that a residue can build up on the hair.
Just know that this content was created from recycled shampoo bottles and organic composting.
Other partners include: Clear Shampoo, Evian, Head, Sony Ericsson, Tiffany and Tag Heuer.
